headline: Citigroup (C) Valuation Check As Investor Day And New AI Plans Draw Fresh Attention
summary: Citigroup (C) is back in the spotlight as investors look ahead to its first investor day in four years. Management plans to update profitability goals, review risk controls, and highlight new AI and compensation initiatives. See our latest analysis for Citigroup. Citigroup’s share price has recently shown firm momentum, with a 1-day share price return of 1.89% and a 30-day share price return of 11.07%. The 1-year total shareholder return of 88.44% and 3-year total shareholder return of about...

headline: Four areas to watch as Citi lays out its multiyear blueprint
summary: On Thursday, Citi will hold its first investor day in four years. The megabank, which has undergone substantial change under CEO Jane Fraser, is expected to share its strategy for driving higher profitability, deploying AI and ramping up shareholder returns.

headline: Super Micro Just Got Two Price Target Hikes. Why Citi, JPMorgan Still Can’t Pull the Trigger
summary: Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) just got two fresh price target hikes from Wall Street heavyweights, and yet neither firm is willing to call it a Buy. Citi lifted its price target on SMCI stock to $31 from $25 while keeping a Neutral rating, and JPMorgan raised its target to $32 from $28, also reiterating Neutral. ... Super Micro Just Got Two Price Target Hikes. Why Citi, JPMorgan Still Can’t Pull the Trigger

headline: Citi changes referral pay for bankers and wealth advisers
summary: In the memo, the bank said it was introducing “partnership awards” across its banking and wealth management operations to reward “meaningful cross-business collaboration”.

headline: Citi Sky AI Assistant Highlights Citigroup Wealth Push With Google Partnership
summary: Citi Wealth, part of Citigroup (NYSE:C), has launched Citi Sky, an AI powered digital assistant for wealth management clients. The tool is built in partnership with Google Cloud and Google DeepMind, using generative AI and real time avatar technology for client interactions. Citi Sky reflects how Citigroup is using AI in a core fee based business where client relationships and advice are central. For wealth management customers, the rollout highlights a move toward more always on digital...
